mission.title: grpc: grpcio fails to install on Apple Silicon
mission.description: grpcio fails to install on Apple Silicon. This issue affects 58+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Look for error: `Command errored out with exit status 1:`

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?
grpcio-1.34.0

### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?
macOS big Sur 11.0.1, running on M1 Apple Silicon

### What runtime / compiler are you using (e.g.

steps.title: Apply the fix for grpcio fails to install on Apple Silicon
steps.description:
sysconfig.get_config_var('MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET')

returns <str> '11.1' in Python 2.7 and <int> 11 in Python 3.9 causing exception: builtins.TypeError: expected string or bytes-like object
```yaml
Python 3.8.7 (default, Dec 30 2020, 02:09:32)
[Clang 12.0.0 (clang-1200.0.32.28)] on darwin
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
```

steps.title: Confirm grpcio fails to install on Apple Silicon is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `Command errored out with exit status 1:` no longer appears.

resolution.summary:
sysconfig.get_config_var('MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET')

returns <str> '11.1' in Python 2.7 and <int> 11 in Python 3.9 causing exception: builtins.TypeError: expected string or bytes-like object
